economic_notes: Collaboration Agreement with Goldcorp Canada Ltd. for 0.5% variable payment plus $450,000 annual community payments from Red Lake Gold Mine. Exploration accommodation agreement with Evolution Mining (Rubicon Minerals) for 1% of exploration expenditures up to $250,000/year. Agreement with Pure Gold Mining Inc. for 1% of exploration expenditures plus capacity costs and production payments. Post year-end exploration agreement with Great Bear Resources Ltd. and Lac Seul First Nation including 50,000 common shares and quarterly drilling payments. Community Trust Fund established to receive industry agreement payments for long-term benefit of members.
notes: Audit is qualified because budget comparatives were not presented in the financial statements, which is a departure from PSAS. Wabauskang Community Trust is consolidated as a subsidiary. Portfolio investments include restricted community trust holdings in Pure Gold Mining and Evolution Mining common shares plus pooled funds. Funds held in trust represent Ottawa Trust Fund under Section 62 of the Indian Act. Surplus repayable of $359,914 on balance sheet. COVID-19 noted as a subsequent event with uncertain impact. No schedule of remuneration disclosed. Segmented government transfers total $4,153,650 differs from Note 13 total of $3,432,173 likely due to allocation methodology including inter-fund transfers; Note 13 figure used as authoritative total government transfers.
